Every measured figure must equal one of the VERIFIED FACTS you are given — never invent, sum, or round a number. Emit by calling the tool exactly once.

Document the FACTUAL current state at reference depth: domain overview + process summary; the end-to-end process_flow (≥3 steps, actor+system each); baseline_stats tiles; the grounded data_tables you can build from the facts (channel mix, lead times, credit bands, collections ladder, connection inventory, top accounts, systems — restate values VERBATIM from the sources, cite each); process_detail per stage; ownership_map (RACI); system_inventory; system_profiles; format_taxonomy; handoff_catalogue. Call emit_current_state exactly once.", "role": "user"}]
